template_id.description: The identifier for the deployment template.

show_instance_configurations.description: If true, will return details for each instance configuration referenced by the template.

show_max_zones.description: If true, will populate the max_zones field in the instance configurations. Only relevant if show_instance_configurations=true.

stack_version.description: If present, it will cause the returned deployment template to be adapted to return only the elements allowed in that version.
